heading: Allotment of land on Indian reservations
label: 5101 Allotment of land on Indian reservations
text: On and after , no land of any Indian reservation, created or set apart by treaty or agreement with the Indians, Act of Congress, Executive order, purchase, or otherwise, shall be allotted in severalty to any Indian.June 18, 1934
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 461 of this title
